subcodes.first_line: We have desired to send unto thee the ocean of utterance from this station, which God hath made the circling-place of the Concourse on High [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا اردنا ان نرسل الیک بحر البیان من هذا المقام الذی جعله الله مطاف الملا
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @exhortations and counsels, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
